description:
Claude Code v2.1.146 + v2.1.147 — two releases, 19 hours, 5 features and 38 fixes. New Workflow tool for deterministic multi-agent orchestration, /simplify renamed to /code-review with effort levels, --comment posts inline GitHub PR comments, and the REPL + Workflow sandboxes hardened against prototype-pollution + thenable escapes.

----
🚀 DYNAMOUS AI COMMUNITY

Want to learn agentic coding with live daily events and workshops?
Check out Dynamous AI: https://dynamous.ai/?code=646a60
Get 10% off here 👉 https://shorturl.smartcode.diy/dynamous_ai_10_percent_discount

⚡ HOSTINGER — RELIABLE HOSTING FOR YOUR PROJECTS (10% OFF)

Whether you're shipping a portfolio, a side project, n8n flows, or AI agents — I use Hostinger for fast, affordable VPS + web hosting.

Get 10% off here 👉 https://hostinger.com/DIYSMARTCODE

(Affiliate link — costs you nothing, supports the channel.)
----

What you will see in this 128-second breakdown:
→ Workflow tool — deterministic multi-agent orchestration in the Claude Code CLI (opt-in via CLAUDE_CODE_WORKFLOWS=1)
→ /simplify is gone — /code-review replaces it with effort levels (high / medium / low) and flags correctness bugs
→ --comment posts findings as inline GitHub PR comments — CI integrations get a first-class hook
→ REPL + Workflow sandboxes hardened against prototype-pollution and thenable-based escapes
→ Enterprise login restrictions now apply to third-party providers and API-key sessions, not just first-party
→ Where the patches landed: 5 PowerShell-on-Windows wins, 4 background-session fixes, 2 MCP + plugin fixes — 38 total
→ Auto-updater no longer hangs: retries transient failures, reports OS error codes, shows your current version on failure

Claude Code v2.1.147 release notes: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/releases/tag/v2.1.147
Claude Code v2.1.146 release notes: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/releases/tag/v2.1.146
Full CHANGELOG: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

Workflow tool, /code-review, or inline PR comments — which one lands in your repo first? Drop your pick in the comments.

#ClaudeCode #Anthropic #AICoding #ClaudeAI #DevTools #AICodingAgent #ClaudeAgents #ClaudeUpdate #ReleaseNotes #ClaudeCodeUpdate #WorkflowTool #CodeReview #PRComments #Sandbox #DeveloperTools #AIAutomation #ClaudeCodeSkills #v2147
fulltitle: 38 Fixes and New Features: Claude Code Update #Shorts #Tech
